negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_7bfad0d4-3135-464a-875e-8c0a17c81b37
prompt: In an underwater environment characterized by a pale blue hue from the pool lighting and tiled pool floor and walls, two individuals are central to the scene. One is fully equipped in scuba diving gear, including a black wetsuit, mask, and breathing apparatus, while the other is dressed in full ice hockey protective gear in white, yellow, black, and green, including a helmet, shoulder pads, and a jersey with visible logos on the chest and arms. The hockey player stands upright, holding a hockey stick with the end touching the ground. The scene is captured at eye level as the camera moves randomly in a full shot of the individuals.  The hockey player, positioned on the right, holds the hockey stick and looks toward the right of the screen before looking down at the stick and moving it slightly forward. The scuba diver, located closer to the pool floor, holds a camera mounted on a handle and captures the scene. He points to the right of the screen and looks back at the hockey player before raising the camera to his face. Air bubbles rise to the surface from the diver’s breathing apparatus. The scuba diver then looks at the camera he is holding, with bubbles floating up from his mask. The floor of the pool features two navy blue designs running horizontally from the left of the frame to the right and two small metal details on both sides of the pool wall: a smaller square on the wall to the right of the hockey player and a larger circle on the pool wall behind and to their left. The entire color scheme of the scene is blue.
